push_update.twitter: Arena Platform Update: {commit_count} new features and fixes just deployed! Latest: {latest_commit} #gaming #eSports #Arena
push_update.facebook: We've just pushed {commit_count} updates to Arena Platform! Including improvements to our automated match system and user experience. Learn more at Arena.gg
push_update.instagram: Platform update! {commit_count} new improvements just deployed to Arena. Better gaming experience incoming! :crossed_swords: #gaming #eSports
push_update.youtube: Arena Platform Update: {commit_count} new commits deployed! Check out what's new in our competitive gaming platform.

release_announcement.twitter: Arena {version} is now available! Major updates including {release_notes[:100]}... Download now: {download_url} #gaming #eSports #Arena
release_announcement.facebook: Exciting news! Arena {version} is now available with major improvements! {release_notes[:200]}... Download now and start competing: {download_url}
release_announcement.instagram: NEW VERSION! Arena {version} is here! :fire: Download now and experience the future of competitive gaming! Link in bio! #gaming #eSports #Arena
release_announcement.youtube: Arena {version} - Major Update Released! New features, improved performance, and enhanced security. Download now and dominate the competition!

feature_update.discord:
## New Feature Alert! :sparkles: 

**{feature_title}** has been added to Arena!

**Details:** {feature_description}

**PR #{pr_number}** merged successfully!

Try it out and let us know what you think! :thumbsup:
feature_update.twitter: New Feature: {feature_title} just added to Arena! {feature_description[:80]}... #gaming #eSports #Arena
feature_update.facebook: We're excited to announce {feature_title} is now live on Arena! {feature_description} Try it out and let us know your feedback!
feature_update.youtube: New Feature Alert: {feature_title} - See what's new in Arena Platform!

tournament_announcement.facebook: Join our {name} tournament! Prize pool: {prize}. Game: {game}. Starts {time}. Register now on Arena.gg and compete to win!
tournament_announcement.instagram: Tournament time! {name} with {prize} prize pool! {game} competition starts {time}. Link in bio to register! :trophy: #gaming #eSports #Arena
tournament_announcement.youtube: LIVE TOURNAMENT: {name} - {prize} Prize Pool! {game} Competition starts {time} - Don't miss out!

platform_update.discord:
## Platform Update :gear: 

**{feature}** is now live on Arena!

**What it does:** {description}

Try it out and share your feedback in #suggestions! :bulb:
platform_update.facebook: We're excited to announce {feature} is now live! {description} Learn more about this new feature on Arena.gg
platform_update.instagram: NEW FEATURE ALERT! {feature} is now live on Arena! {description} Try it now! :sparkles: #gaming #eSports #Arena
platform_update.youtube: New Feature Deep Dive: {feature} - See how it works and why it matters for competitive gaming!

security_update.twitter: Security Update: Critical fixes deployed to Arena. Please update immediately! Download: {download_url} #security #gaming #Arena
security_update.facebook: Important security update deployed to Arena Platform! {fixes} Please update your client immediately to ensure account security. Download at Arena.gg
security_update.youtube: URGENT: Security Update for Arena Platform - Critical fixes deployed. Update immediately!

maintenance_notice.twitter: Scheduled Maintenance: {time} for {duration}. Some services may be temporarily unavailable. We'll be back soon! #Arena #gaming
maintenance_notice.facebook: Scheduled maintenance on {time} for {duration}. Some Arena services may be temporarily unavailable. We appreciate your patience and will be back online shortly!
maintenance_notice.instagram: Maintenance Alert! We'll be down {time} for {duration} to improve your gaming experience. Back soon! :wrench: #gaming #Arena
maintenance_notice.youtube: Maintenance Notice: Arena Platform scheduled maintenance {time} for {duration} - Service improvements incoming!

community_highlight.facebook: Community Spotlight! Congratulations to {player_name} for achieving {achievement}! {stats} Join us in celebrating this incredible performance!
community_highlight.youtube: Player Spotlight: {player_name} - {achievement} - Incredible performance on Arena Platform!

bug_fix_announcement.twitter: Bug fixes deployed! {fixes} Arena {version} is now more stable. #gaming #eSports #Arena
bug_fix_announcement.facebook: We've fixed several issues in Arena {version}! {fixes} The platform is now more stable and reliable. Update now!
bug_fix_announcement.instagram: Bug fixes! :bug: {fixes} Arena {version} is now more stable. Update now! :gear: #gaming #Arena
bug_fix_announcement.youtube: Bug Fix Update: Arena {version} - Major stability improvements and bug fixes deployed!
